expectations.text: Fetches the quest first to inspect action.kind
expectations.evidence: Step 5: `curl -sS -H "x-api-key: $QUPILOT_API_KEY" "https://api.qupilot.xyz/v1/quests/qst_01HXYWEIRDONE"` — quest fetched before any join or execution. Line 4: 'Before doing anything else, fetch the quest to see the actual action.kind. Do NOT call /agent/participations yet.'

expectations.text: Identifies action.kind as not in quest-mapping.md
expectations.evidence: Step 8: Lists all 6 known kinds from quest-mapping.md (swap, provide-liquidity, open-position, close-position, hold-position, trade-volume) and explicitly states '`social-post` is not in the mapping table.' References 'references/quest-mapping.md' by name.

expectations.text: Does NOT call /agent/participations (does not join the quest)
expectations.evidence: Step 9: 'Decision: STOP. Do not call POST /agent/participations.' No POST to /agent/participations anywhere in transcript.

expectations.text: Does NOT run any byreal-cli or byreal-perps-cli command
expectations.evidence: Step 9: 'Do not run any byreal-cli or byreal-perps-cli command.' No byreal-cli or byreal-perps-cli invocations in the entire transcript.

expectations.text: Surfaces the unknown kind verbatim to the user
expectations.evidence: Response section: 'Action kind: `social-post`' — surfaces the exact value `"social-post"` from the quest response in backticks, verbatim. Does not paraphrase as 'Twitter task' or 'social media' in the technical identification.

expectations.text: Provides a clear path to extend the mapping (what needs to be added to quest-mapping.md)
expectations.evidence: Lines 11-12 (response extension path): 3 concrete steps: (1) add social-post row to references/quest-mapping.md with pre-flight, CLI command, proof field, and complete curl; (2) add new companion skill to SKILL.md composes; (3) re-run the runner. Explicitly names the file `references/quest-mapping.md`.
